title: MSCA Postdoctoral Fellowships 2026
summary: Supports incoming or outgoing postdoctoral researchers with strong supervision, training, and mobility components.
reality_check: Highly relevant for top individual candidates, but success depends on early host-candidate matching and a credible career development plan.

title: ERC Advanced Grant
summary: Frontier-research funding for established principal investigators with a strong track record and ambitious scientific vision.
reality_check: Important prestige instrument, but realistic only for senior researchers with exceptional publication impact and clear independence.

title: Horizon Europe Research Infrastructures Calls
summary: Collaborative calls supporting transnational access, infrastructure upgrades, interoperability, and research service capacity.
reality_check: Best fit where UJF joins a wider consortium and can offer a concrete facility, dataset, or technical capability.

title: Euratom Research and Training Actions
summary: Targeted EU calls for nuclear research, radiation protection, education, and cross-border collaboration in the Euratom framework.
reality_check: Strategically strong for UJF, but timing depends on work programme publication and consortium preparation usually starts well before opening.

title: TA CR SIGMA - Applied Research for Public Needs
summary: National applied research support for consortia solving practical public-sector or societal needs with measurable outputs.
reality_check: Useful when UJF has a concrete implementation partner and can frame deliverables beyond basic research.

title: OP JAK - Top Research
summary: Large-scale Czech calls aimed at research excellence, capacity building, and development of major scientific teams and infrastructure.
reality_check: Relevant for institutional growth, but preparation is demanding and typically requires internal prioritization well before call launch.
